blockCmdPrompt.description: Blocks command prompt and batch file processing for standard users to mitigate ClickFix social engineering attacks.

blockRegistryEditor.description: Prevents access to registry editing tools and silent .reg file processing for standard users.

asrRules.description: Attack Surface Reduction rules providing defense-in-depth against script-based and executable-based attacks.

rules.name: Block execution of potentially obfuscated scripts
Block executable files unless they meet prevalence, age, or trusted list criteria
Block executable content from email client and webmail
Block process creations originating from PSExec and WMI commands

wdac.description: Blocks execution of PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd, and other scriptable binaries via Windows Defender Application Control. Works on Pro, Enterprise, and Education editions.

group.groupDescription: Security group for ClickFix protection policies. Add device objects that should receive CMD, PowerShell, Registry, and Windows Terminal restrictions. WDAC is device-scoped -- add devices, not users.
